s3.bucket.notificationconfig.EventBridge.Description: Enables delivery of events to Amazon EventBridge.

s3.bucket.notificationconfig.LambdaConfi.Description: Describes the AWS Lambda functions to invoke and the events for which to invoke them.

s3.bucket.notificationconfig.QueueConfig.Description: The Amazon Simple Queue Service queues to publish messages to and the events for which to publish messages.

s3.bucket.notificationconfig.TopicConfig.Description: The topic to which notifications are sent and the events for which notifications are generated.
